title: Food Safety & Hygiene Audit
description: Comprehensive food safety and hygiene inspection covering temperature controls, personal hygiene, food storage, and sanitation practices.

sections.title: Temperature Controls
sections.description: Verify all temperature-sensitive equipment is operating within safe ranges.

items.question: Is the walk-in freezer at -18°C or below?
items.help_text: Check the digital thermometer on the freezer door. Record the exact reading in notes.

items.question: Is the refrigerator at 4°C or below?
items.help_text: Check all refrigeration units. Each must be at 4°C or below.

items.question: Are hot-hold items maintained above 63°C?
items.help_text: Use a probe thermometer to check at least 3 items on the hot-hold line.

items.question: Is the cold-display case operating within range?
items.help_text: Cold display should be between 1°C and 5°C.

sections.title: Personal Hygiene
sections.description: Ensure all staff comply with personal hygiene standards.

items.question: Are handwashing stations stocked and accessible?
items.help_text: Check for soap, paper towels, and running hot water.

items.question: Are staff wearing disposable gloves when handling food?
Are all staff wearing appropriate hair nets?
Are uniforms clean and in good condition?

sections.title: Food Storage
sections.description: Verify proper food storage and labeling practices.

items.question: Are all items properly labeled with date and contents?
items.help_text: Check labels on all containers in the walk-in and prep area.

items.question: Is FIFO (First In, First Out) being followed?
Is there adequate separation to prevent cross-contamination?
items.help_text: Raw meats must be stored below cooked items. Separate cutting boards for different food types.

items.question: Are allergens stored and labeled separately?
Are food contact surfaces properly sanitized?
items.help_text: Check sanitizer concentration levels and cleaning schedules.

items.question: Is all equipment clean and free of residue?
Is waste disposed of properly and bins not overflowing?

title: Equipment Safety Inspection
description: Safety inspection of all operational equipment including POS systems, kitchen equipment, and HVAC.

sections.title: Kitchen Equipment
sections.description: Inspect all kitchen equipment for safety compliance.

items.question: Are all gas connections secure with no leaks?
Are fire suppression systems operational?
Are electrical cords in good condition (no fraying)?
Are refrigeration units maintaining correct temperatures?

sections.title: POS & Technology
sections.description: Verify POS systems and technology infrastructure.

items.question: Are all POS terminals operational?
Is the network connectivity stable?
Are payment terminals PCI compliant?
Are backup systems functional?

sections.title: HVAC & Facilities
sections.description: Inspect HVAC systems and general facility condition.

items.question: Is HVAC system maintaining comfortable temperatures?
Are emergency exits clear and properly marked?
Are fire extinguishers in date and accessible?
Are walkways clear of obstacles?

title: Daily Opening Checklist
description: Pre-opening checklist to ensure the location is ready for service.

items.question: Are all tables clean and properly set?
Is the floor clean and free of hazards?
Are menu boards updated with correct pricing?
Is lighting working in all areas?
Are restrooms clean and stocked?
Is the prep area clean and ready?
Are all required ingredients available?
Is the dishwashing station functional?
Are staff schedules posted and confirmed?
Is the receiving area clear for deliveries?

title: Guest Experience Quality Audit
description: Quality audit focused on guest-facing service and experience standards.

sections.title: Service Standards
sections.description: Evaluate adherence to guest service standards.

items.question: Were guests greeted within 30 seconds of arrival?
Did staff demonstrate menu knowledge?
Were orders delivered within expected timeframe?
Is table presentation up to brand standards?
Is food plating consistent with standards?
Are complaints handled within 5 minutes?
Is a follow-up offered to dissatisfied guests?
Are guest feedback cards available?
